summary: Plan 15C is implementation-ready after Plans 06 and 15B. It is a thin Bedrock consumer of the universal policy, with recursive installed-model pinning, complete usage validation, bounded multi-output handling, audit-before-telemetry, optional-extra readiness, full-vs-web schema separation, private-binding redaction, boundary parity, and reusable live proof.

review_basis.head: 07fc10b42fa0f8683630f249489368b5b072f8ff
review_basis.process: Independent reality, quality/security, systems/dependency, and final re-review against live AWS SDK docs/model expectations, ELSPETH audit clients, catalog gates, and Plan 10/12 ownership.

warnings.detail: Local Stubber/model proofs do not grant runtime GO; Plans 10 and 12 must execute approved run-scoped Guardrails through each candidate task role with zero skips.
The initial AWS harmful-content categories do not include Azure self_harm parity; equivalent coverage needs an additional approved control or explicit operator decision.

resolved_findings.resolution: Task 0 recursively walks the installed botocore input/output model, nested enums, required fields, filters, detected fact, and usage members.
Every SDK-importing suite uses uv run --extra aws and generic local-requirement checks distinguish unallowlisted from requested missing dependencies.
Parser decisions bind to the installed model, block detect-only positives, model all usage keys, and accept bounded 1..N legitimate intervention outputs while discarding text.
Catalog assistance, plugin hashes, determinism boundary inventory, discovery parity, and staging are complete.
Full CLI knob goldens remain explicit while web policy-view goldens expose only aliases and safe options.
The client subclasses AuditedClientBase, records through _record_call before telemetry, and suppresses telemetry on audit failure.
Private Guardrail bindings have zero-occurrence tests across run/node config, exports, prompts, errors, logs, and telemetry.
The live_aws marker/env contract, approved operator fixtures, and Plan 10/12 skip/deselection rejection are explicit.

verification: official ApplyGuardrail documentation reconciled for outputScope FULL, detect-mode detected, and intervention outputs
live AuditedClientBase record-before-telemetry seam and plugin boundary expectations inspected
all Plan 15C SDK suites explicitly select the aws extra
Plan 10/12 live marker and zero-skip handoff reconciled
Markdown fences balanced and git diff --check clean

review_history.summary: Initial review found response-model guesses, incomplete usage, one-output rejection, missing optional-extra enforcement, wrong catalog golden surface, incomplete assistance/boundary registration, private binding leaks, and ambiguous live ownership.
